Driver MCU with integrated 6-MOSFET, 2A continuous drive, built-in LDO
Driver MCU with integrated MOSFETs, 1.5A max drive, 2x OPA, 2x CMP
Pre-driver MCU, 60V gate driver, 3x OPA, 3x CMP, 5V LDO, 1A sink/source
Touch-sensing specialized MCU. 16 touch channels. 4x high-current drive pins (120mA). LED matrix drive 4x8. Also available in 16KB flash variant (APT32F101x4).
Also available as APT32F1021B (24MHz reduced version). 32KB flash variants available. 4 high-current drive pins. 3 groups 6 channels complementary PWM with dead zone.
Similar to APT32F1021 with same core and peripherals. 32KB flash variants available.
Most popular model in F102X series. Used by Midea, Bosch, Xiaomi, Panasonic. 32KB flash and 24MHz B variants available. 4 high-current drive pins.
6-channel DMA. Up to 25 touch channels. 4 high-current drive pins. USART (LIN) also available. Some sources mention Cortex-M0+ but likely RISC-V given APT's product line focus.
Capless touch specialized MCU. LED matrix/point drive. Low power focused. Specific flash/SRAM sizes may vary by sub-model.
Low power down to 1uA. 256B retention SRAM. 32 touch channels. LCD 8COMx26SEG or 4COMx30SEG. 10 high-current drive pins. 4 DMA channels.
Similar to APT32F1101 with additional QFN packages. 4 DMA channels. 10 high-current drive pins.
Full-featured F110X. 32 touch channels. LCD 8COMx26SEG or 4COMx30SEG. 4 DMA channels. 10 high-current drive pins.
STM32F103C8T6 pin-compatible option. 32 touch channels. 4 DMA channels. 10 high-current drive pins. Extended temp -40~105°C available.
Motor control dedicated MCU. Integrated COP/OPA/CMP. PWM hardware/software brake support. Specific sub-models: APT32F1701/1702. 144MHz high-speed timer for some variants.
Inverter/motor control dedicated. 6 independent comparators. 2 OPAs. 8 high-current drive pins (120mA). 3 groups 6 channels complementary PWM with dead zone. 5 packages, 10 models.
General purpose with rich analog. 5 comparators, 2 OPAs. 20 touch channels. 8x8 LED matrix drive. 32KB flash variant (K6) available.
High-performance motor control. 8K ICACHE, FPU, DSP. 1 ADC. 10 sync GPTA/B timers. 14 high-current drive pins. CAN 2.0/2.0B.
Dual motor drive capable. 2 high-speed ADCs, 3MSPS. 4 OPAs, 3 CMPs, 1 DAC. 10 sync GPTA/B timers with complementary dead zone. CAN 2.0/2.0B. 105MHz max, 3.5 CoreMark/MHz.
Ultra low-cost MCU. S003 compatible. Specific specs may vary. Limited public datasheet availability.
High cost-performance with rich analog. 144MHz high-speed timer (not CPU freq). PD protocol support. For motor and industrial control. Specific sub-models may vary.
General purpose. 4 high-current drive pins. 3 groups 6 channels complementary PWM with dead zone. 32KB flash variant available.
